heroLede: Product owner / forward-deployed engineer by day, CS student by night. I like problems with feedback loops: agents, controllers, catalogs, and the occasional rabbit hole.
paragraphs: By day I’m a product owner and forward-deployed engineer at ConvergeHEALTH by Deloitte, building an agentic platform for healthcare revenue cycle. Concretely: three production agents in Langflow — an orchestrator, account research, and GraphDB query — pulling from Amazon Redshift and Neo4j. By night, this site: coursework that got out of hand, and personal tools made with Claude Code that solved a real problem in my apartment (usually the CD shelf).

I care about work that can be inspected: plots over adjectives, demos over decks. School projects respect the honor code — source stays private, but I'm happy to walk through the design decisions live.
asideNote: Recruiters: the CV is one tab over.
